induced_prompt_raw: Generate a sentence featuring exactly three nested relative clauses (triply center-embedded), containing four nouns followed by four verbs in a strict SOV hierarchy (e.g., "The [Noun1] the [Noun2] the [Noun3] the [Noun4] [Verb4] [Verb3] [Verb2] [Verb1]"). Avoid having only two nested clauses (three nouns and three verbs).
